name: delta-clickhouse
description: Query Delta Lake tables in ClickHouse using deltaLake table function

aws_access_key_id.title: AWS Access Key ID
aws_access_key_id.description: Access key for the S3 bucket containing your Delta table

aws_secret_access_key.title: AWS Secret Access Key
aws_secret_access_key.description: Secret key for the S3 bucket containing your Delta table

path.title: Delta Table Path
path.description: S3 path to your Delta table

errorMessage.pattern: Must be an S3 URI (e.g. s3://bucket/delta_table)

files.name: model
files.code_template:
# Model YAML
# Reference documentation: https://docs.rilldata.com/reference/project-files/models
type: model
materialize: true
connector: clickhouse
sql: |
  SELECT * FROM deltaLake(
      '[[ s3ToHTTPS .path ]]',
      '[[ propVal .props "aws_access_key_id" ]]',
      '[[ propVal .props "aws_secret_access_key" ]]'
  )
